final:
module six_input_one_output (
    input  A1,
    input  A2,
    input  B1,
    input  B2,
    input  C1,
    input  C2,
    output Y
);

    assign Y = (A1 & A2) | (B1 & B2) | (C1 & C2);

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Y <= ~((A1 & A2) | (B1 & B2) | (C1 & C2));
    end
  end

endmodule
